raw_caption:
{
"chronological\_analysis": "In the video, a young woman is shown sitting at a table with a plate of food in front of her. The camera is positioned at eye level, giving us a clear view of the food. The food looks abundant and appetizing, and the woman seems ready to start eating. The camera then cuts to a close-up shot of the food, highlighting its texture and visual physics. The light glints off the surface, showing a shiny glaze. The woman takes a bite, and the camera captures the moment from a side angle, showing the full reaction of her face and the food. She chews with a satisfying noise, indicating that it's delicious. The camera then cuts to a close-up of the food again, showing the details of the meat being torn apart easily and the cheese stretching out, indicating a satisfying texture. The camera then cuts back to the woman's face, showing her enjoyment of the food. The Korean subtitles appear on the screen, reading '술안주', which translates to 'tasting and enjoying' in English.",
"highlight\_keywords": [
"Young woman",
"Plate of food",
"Texture",
"Close-up shot",
"Meat being torn apart",
"Cheese stretching"
]
}
